title: Google strikes back! Gemini Omni, AI glasses, new models
summary: Google I/O showcased new AI models including Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash, and Gemini Spark, alongside new hardware like TPU 8 and AI glasses. The video covers agentic search, personal intelligence features, and workspace integrations across Google's product suite.
